positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist forest scene silhouette, rendered in solid black and vibrant teal linework on a crisp off-white background. The composition must feature a central cluster of fantastical flora, intertwining with abstract celestial motifs like crescent moons and starbursts. The style is modern vector art, giving the appearance of a woodcut engraving merged with bioluminescent glowing details. Strong, clean contrast and crisp edges are essential. Composition must be perfectly centered, optimized for seamless repeat or singular garment placement. Full body coverage, high detail, pop art aesthetic, elegant, symmetry.
negative: blurry, messy, grunge, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noisy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, amateur, photograph, solid colors, gradients, saturation, cinematic, realism
